title: 2025-09-17 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 5.68
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2025-09-17: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 5.68/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and inflation expectations shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2025-09-17, the score printed 5.68/100 in the low regime, with volatility and inflation expectations doing most of the work.
